description_long: This auto repair shop features a rectangular main building with a flat roof and three prominent white roof beams, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The facade includes a wide entrance, likely for vehicles, and a smaller attached structure to the side, possibly an office or waiting area. The main building is accented with red and gray horizontal stripes, and there is a small sign above the entrance. The rear and side views reveal a series of arched roof segments, suggesting multiple service bays or work areas. The exterior is primarily concrete or stucco, with some metal and glass elements visible. The shop is situated on a flat, open lot, providing ample space for vehicle maneuvering and parking.
description: A rectangular auto repair shop with a flat roof, red and gray accents, and an attached side structure, featuring multiple service bays and a wide vehicle entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, red and gray facade accents, and attached side structure.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the arched roof segments and the overall depth of the building.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with clear visibility of the roof beams and side structure.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the series of arched roof segments and the compact side extension.
attribute_signage: A rectangular sign with red and white coloring above the main entrance.
attribute_garage_doors: One large sectional garage door at the front, likely metal, approximately 3 meters high and 4 meters wide.
